# obr

> Provides clean, tidy access to data published by the 'Office for Budget Responsibility' ('OBR'), the UK's independent fiscal watchdog. Install with `install.packages("obr")`.

Version: 0.2.5. License: MIT.

## Functions

- [`clear_cache()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/clear_cache.html): Clear cached OBR files
- [`get_efo_economy()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_efo_economy.html): Get EFO economy projections
- [`get_efo_fiscal()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_efo_fiscal.html): Get EFO fiscal projections (net borrowing components)
- [`get_expenditure()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_expenditure.html): Get Total Managed Expenditure
- [`get_forecasts()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_forecasts.html): Get OBR forecast history for a fiscal series
- [`get_incapacity_caseloads()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_incapacity_caseloads.html): Get incapacity benefit caseloads
- [`get_incapacity_spending()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_incapacity_spending.html): Get incapacity benefits spending by type
- [`get_pension_projections()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_pension_projections.html): Get long-run state pension spending projections
- [`get_psnb()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_psnb.html): Get Public Sector Net Borrowing (PSNB)
- [`get_psnd()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_psnd.html): Get Public Sector Net Debt (PSND)
- [`get_public_finances()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_public_finances.html): Get all Public Finances Databank aggregates
- [`get_receipts()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_receipts.html): Get public sector receipts by tax type
- [`get_welfare_spending()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/get_welfare_spending.html): Get working-age welfare spending
- [`list_efo_economy_measures()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/list_efo_economy_measures.html): List available EFO economy measures
- [`list_forecast_series()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/list_forecast_series.html): List available forecast series

## Documentation

- [Full reference](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/obr/reference/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlescoverdale/obr)
- [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=obr)
